title: An Act authorizing the Town of Westford to grant one additional license for the sale of all alcoholic beverages to be drunk off the premises

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Arciero of Westford, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 5075) of James Arciero (by vote of the town) that the town of Westford be authorized to grant one additional license for the sale of all alcoholic beverages to be drunk off the premises in said town.  Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure

related_entities.name: committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure
the committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 03/27/2026 from 09:00 AM-05:00 PM in Written Testimony Only
Accompanied a new draft, see H5345
